PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM

SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM - TRIAL COURT CALENDAR
Off Calendar Apr-07-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Alexander Anolik, Plaintiff in Pro Per
Jonathan Planas, San Francisco Assistant Station Manager for defendant Southwest Airlines Co.

The Court makes disclosure that she flies on Southwest Airlines and was a member of the Frequent Flyer Program. Court declares that it will not affect her ability to remain fair and impartial.

Parties present their respective case by testimony and documentary evidence.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Evidence is retained.

Judge Marla J. Miller, Clerk C. Banayad, not reported (604)
